text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Super Creek and I are talking about
training...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Gosh, I'm sorry. Did I startle you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You're such a kind soul. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I have a bit of a headache, but I'm sure I'll be
right as rain in no time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So no need to worry, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, she appears to be in pain.
I should probably keep an eye on her.
